arts.sum: Liverpool are one of the clubs in the picture to sign 1. FC Nürnberg star Stefanos Tzimas, according to multiple claims. Last summer, the striker joined the second division German club on loan with an option to buy of €18m. arts.ttl: Lille's Jonathan David is one of the best strikers in Europe and a free agent this summer - so why on earth is no one talking about him?!
arts.sum: This season alone, David has 24 goal contributions to his name from 30 games across all competitions, with his stellar performances helping Lille to punch above their weight in the Champions League and push for their first top-three finish in Ligue 1 since their historic title success in 2020-21. That is made all the more bizarre by the fact he is now in the final six months of his contract at the Stade Pierre-Mauroy, and will almost certainly be available on a free transfer in the summer window.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Lille – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool will confirm their place in the Champions League’s last 16 if the Reds avoid defeat against Lille on Tuesday night. Arne Slot’s side have a perfect record of six wins from six games in Europe this season and need just one point for automatic entry to the first knockout round. arts.ttl: Jonathan David - on the move in 2025 but out to stop Liverpool
